LanguageData.GR_AllowExtracted.description: Allow corpses that have had their genomes extracted by a genome excavator.
LanguageData.GR_AllowExtracted.label: allow extracted
LanguageData.GR_AllowUnextracted.description: Allow corpses that haven't had their genomes extracted by a genome excavator.
LanguageData.GR_AllowUnextracted.label: allow unextracted
